/usr/bin/ar qc libui_interface.a CMakeFiles/ui_interface.dir/src/UI_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ui_interface.dir/src/tunable_param_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ui_interface.dir/home/coco/project/omni/third_party/dear_imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ui_interface.dir/home/coco/project/omni/third_party/dear_imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ui_interface.dir/home/coco/project/omni/third_party/dear_imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ui_interface.dir/home/coco/project/omni/third_party/dear_imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ui_interface.dir/home/coco/project/omni/third_party/dear_imgui/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ui_interface.dir/home/coco/project/omni/third_party/dear_imgui/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libui_interface.a
